signIn.title: Synamail
signIn.subtitle: Connect Synamail to your Synaplan workspace.
signIn.invalidUrl: That doesn't look like a valid URL. Include https:// — e.g. https://web.synaplan.com
signIn.httpsRequired: Outlook requires an HTTPS address for sign-in. A plain http:// URL (including http://localhost) won't work — run the local HTTPS bridge and use https://localhost:5174 instead.
signIn.localDevHint: Developers: point Synamail at a local instance over HTTPS, e.g. https://localhost:5174 (run 'make bridge'). Click Save so the value persists and isn't lost when you change something.

home.title: Home
home.intro: Chat with Synaplan, search and vectorize your mail, or draft a new email — no message selection needed.

commands.searchSub: Find messages about a topic and add them to your knowledge base
commands.newMailSub: Describe it and let AI draft the email

chat.emptyHint: Start a conversation — ask a question or paste some text.

newMail.title: New email
newMail.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Ask the supplier to confirm the May delivery date and CC accounting.
newMail.unsupportedHost: This Outlook host can't open a new message window from an add-in.
newMail.opened: Draft opened in a new Outlook window.

blockDialog.title: Block this sender?
blockDialog.body: Future messages from {email} will be moved to Junk and Synamail will skip them.
blockDialog.alsoClean: Also move existing messages from this sender to Junk
blockDialog.undoHint: You can undo this any time in Outlook → Rules.
blockDialog.successServer: Rule created. {moved} existing messages moved to Junk.
blockDialog.successMock: Rule created (dev mock) for {email}. The real rule lands in Sprint 4.

compose.title: Compose mode
compose.intentPlaceholder: Describe what you want to write…

settings.title: Settings
settings.instanceHint: Edit before signing in to use a self-hosted server.

common.mockMode: Mock mode — Sprint 3 wires this to web.synaplan.com
